steps.name: validation-corpus-and-acceptance-contract
steps.summary: RQF1 added scripts/rag_quality_validation_contract.py, tests/test_rag_quality_validation_contract.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-rqf1-validation-contract.md. It defines public-safe RAG validation commands, metrics, promotion blockers, and boundaries while keeping default retriever changes forbidden.

steps.name: current-retriever-baseline-snapshot
steps.summary: RQF2 added scripts/rag_quality_baseline_snapshot.py, tests/test_rag_quality_baseline_snapshot.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-rqf2-baseline-snapshot.md. It records that the current default retriever baseline contract is ready but fresh numeric local eval evidence is missing from public reports, so default changes remain forbidden.

steps.name: opt-in-retriever-regression-matrix
steps.summary: RQF3 added scripts/rag_quality_regression_matrix.py, tests/test_rag_quality_regression_matrix.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-rqf3-regression-matrix.md. The matrix defers promotion because fresh numeric eval, regression count, and latency comparison are not recomputed, while rollback evidence remains documented.

steps.name: promotion-decision-gate
steps.summary: RQF4 added scripts/rag_quality_promotion_decision_gate.py, tests/test_rag_quality_promotion_decision_gate.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-rqf4-promotion-decision.md. The decision is defer: default retriever changes remain forbidden because fresh numeric evidence and explicit authorization are missing.

steps.name: horizon-close-and-next-gap-handoff
steps.summary: RQF5 added scripts/rag_quality_fresh_validation_close_gate.py, tests/test_rag_quality_fresh_validation_close_gate.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-rag-quality-fresh-validation-close-report.md. The horizon closes as defer: default retriever changes remain forbidden, and the next objective-gap horizon is private-parser-realism-hardening.
